title: “This is exhausting”: Candace Owens intensifies clash with Erika Kirk after TPUSA event exit as threat claims face public doubt
summary_full: Candace Owens publicly challenged Erika Kirk’s claim that security threats forced her to skip a TPUSA event with JD Vance. Owens said the real reason was low ticket sales, while Kirk maintained her decision was based on safety advice. With no confirmed details from either side, the situation has turned into a growing online feud.
